title: Discovery Parks - Fraser Street, Hervey Bay
description: Relaxed lodge with modest cabins, as well as 2 outdoor pools & a lagoon featuring wildlife.
address: 20 Fraser St, Torquay QLD 4655, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set in lush tropical gardens, this laid-back lodge is an 8-minute walk from Torquay Beach, 3 km from Hervey Bay Botanic Gardens and 5 km from Reef World Aquarium.
 Unfussy 1- and 2-bedroom cabins offer living/dining areas, kitchens and furnished patios. All have limited free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs. Upgraded cabins add whirlpool tubs, lagoon views and/or gardens.
 Parking is complimentary. There are also 2 outdoor pools (1 with a kids' section and a hot tub) and a lagoon featuring wildlife, as well as a tennis court, a game room and a playground. Other amenities include 2 outdoor kitchens, BBQ areas and coin-operated laundries.

title: Tasman Holiday Parks - Hervey Bay
description: Laid-back pick with a kids' playground, a BBQ area, a game room and a library, plus free Wi-Fi.
address: 295 Boat Harbour Dr, Scarness QLD 4655, Australia
hotelDescription:
A 13-minute walk from the beach, this laid-back property is 1.1 km from the Hervey Bay Historical Village and Museum, and 7 km from the Urangan Pier.
 The basic studios offer free Wi-Fi, en suite bathrooms and kitchenettes. Cabins have full kitchens, while family cabins add flat-screen TVs, living and dining areas and/or verandas. A 2-bedroom villa is also available.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool, a kids' playground and a BBQ area with picnic tables. There's also a game room, a lounge with a flat-screen TV, a library and a communal kitchen. Guest laundry is on-site.
